name: Nasod | Unrequited Love
description:
You're just really good friends... Right? Well, boy's been crushin' on you HARD. You being a demon doesn't deter him from wanting that cookie.

This is a smaller bot, I didn't want to spend too much time dwelling on this so this is all I will do. However, I will add more scenarios when I have more ideas. Bear with me.

Extra Pics!

Art Corner (da real Nasod):

Digital and trad Nasod collage

Devil Nasod? :3

Let me know if you want an alt where you and Nasod first met each other :) I'll even make an alt where you're both grown up if you request it. He will look quite different when he's more mature. (I know bcz I've drawn him as an adult before)
creator: AquarisMizu
